title: US Markets Close Out a Strong Month With Gains
text: U.S. equities indexes posted a positive performance to end a strong month of January, with positive financial reports contributing to the advance.

title: International Paper Company (IP) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call January 31, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Mark Nellessen - Vice President of Investor Relations Mark Sutton - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Tim Nicholls - Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Gabe Hajde - Wells Fargo Securities George Staphos - Bank of America Mark Weintraub - Seaport Research Partners Mike Roxland - Truist Securities Matthew McKellar - RBC Capital Markets Cleve Rueckert - UBS John Dunigan - Jefferies Adam Josephson - KeyBanc Anthony Pettinari - Citi Operator Good morning and thank you for standing by. Welcome to today's International Paper's Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Call.

title: International Paper (IP) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Up Y/Y
text: International Paper's (IP) Q4 earnings gain on higher sales price. However, low volumes due to weak consumer spending amid the inflationary scenario continue to have a dampening impact.

title: International Paper (IP) Q4 Earnings Top Estimates
text: International Paper (IP) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 26.09% and 0.96%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 7 Stocks to Buy as a New Bull Market Emerges
text: After a rough 2022 full of geopolitical instability and skyrocketing inflation, the concept of stocks to buy for the new year may have appeared imprudent just a few weeks ago. However, the equities sector generally responded well, encouraging investors to take a shot.

title: What Awaits International Paper (IP) in Q4 Earnings?
text: International Paper's (IP) Q4 performance will likely reflect the ongoing weakness in packaging demand due to muted customer spending as well as elevated costs.

title: International Paper Strikes Deal to Divest Russian Pulp Business
text: With the deal, the American forest-products company becomes the latest U.S. firm to exit from Russia since Moscow invaded Ukraine.

title: My 3 Top Dividend Stocks for January
text: It's the right time to seek out reliable cash-producing companies.
